entry.title: C语法(一) 三子棋
entry.content:
三子棋源代码

#include <stdio.h>
#define ROW 3
#define COL 3
void menu();
void game();
void initBoard(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col);
void displayBoard(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col);
void Playermove(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col);
void Computermove(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col);
char isWin(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col);
int isFull(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col);
int main(void) {
int input = 0;
srand(time(NULL));
menu();
printf_s(“请选择 ”);
do {
scanf_s(“%d”, &input);
switch (input) {
case 1:
game();
break;
case 0:
break;
default:
printf_s(“重新输入”);
break;
}
} while (input);
return 0;
}
void menu() {
printf_s(“******************* ”);
printf_s(“1.play ”);
printf_s(“0.exit ”);
printf_s(“****************** ”);
}
void initBoard(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col)
{
int i = 0;
int j = 0;
for (i = 0; i < row; i++) {
for (j = 0; j < col; j++) {
board[i][j] = ‘ ‘;
}
}
}
void displayBoard(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col)
{
int i = 0;
for (i = 0; i < row; i++) {
int j = 0;
for (j = 0; j < col; j++) {
printf_s(“ %c “, board[i][j]);
if (j < row - 1) {
printf_s(“|”);
}
}
printf_s(“ ”);
if (i < row - 1) {
for (j = 0; j < col; j++) {
printf_s(“—“);
if (j < col - 1) {
printf_s(“|”);
}
}
}
printf_s(“ ”);
}
printf_s(“ ”);
}
void Playermove(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col) {
int x = 0;
int y = 0;
printf_s(“请输入坐标(例如1 1) ”);
scanf_s(“%d %d”, &x, &y);
while (1) {
if (x <= row && y <= col) {
if (board[x-1][y-1] == ‘ ‘) {
board[x - 1][y - 1] = ‘‘;
break;
}
else {
printf_s(“已被占用 ”);
Playermove(board, ROW, COL);
break;
}
}
else {
printf_s(“请重新输入 ”);
Playermove(board, ROW, COL);
break;
}
}
}
void Computermove(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col) {
printf_s(“电脑走 ”);
while (1)
{
int x = rand() % row;
int y = rand() % col;
if (board[x][y] == ‘ ‘)
{
board[x][y] = ‘#’;
break;
}
}
}
int isFull(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col) {
int i, j;
for (i = 0; i < row; i++) {
for (j = 0; i < col; j++) {
if (board[i][j] == ‘ ‘) {
return 1; //1是不满
}
}
}
return 0; //0是棋盘满了
}
char isWin(char board[ROW][COL], int row, int col) {
int i = 0;
for (i = 0; i < row; i++) {
if (board[i][0] == board[i][1]&&board[i][1]==board[i][2] && board[i][0] != ‘ ‘){
return board[i][1];
}
}
for (i = 0; i < col; i++) {
if (board[0][i] == board[1][i] && board[1][i] == board[2][i] && board[1][i] != ‘ ‘) {
return board[1][i];
}
}
if (board[0][0] == board[1][1] && board[2][2] == board[1][1] && board[1][1] != ‘ ‘) {
return board[1][1];
}
if (board[0][2] == board[1][1] && board[2][0] == board[1][1] && board[1][1] != ‘ ‘) {
return board[1][1];
}
int ret=isFull(board, ROW, COL);
if (ret == 0) {
return ‘Q’;
}
return ‘C’;
}
void game()
{
char ret = ‘ ‘;
char board[ROW][COL]; //定义棋盘
initBoard(board, ROW, COL); //初始化棋盘
displayBoard(board, ROW, COL); //打印棋盘
while (1)
{
Playermove(board, ROW, COL);
displayBoard(board, ROW, COL);
ret=isWin(board, ROW, COL);
if (ret != ‘C’) {
break;
}
Computermove(board, ROW, COL);
displayBoard(board, ROW, COL);
ret = isWin(board, ROW, COL);
if (ret != ‘C’) {
break;
}
}
if (ret == ‘*’)
{
printf_s(“你赢了!”);
}
else if (ret == ‘#’)
{
printf_s(“你输了!”);
}
else
{
printf_s(“平局”);
}
}

迭代源代码

输入一个数字,从高到低输出它

#include <stdio.h>
void f(int n);
int main()
{
int n;
scanf(“%d”,&n);
f(n);
return 0;
}
void f(int n){
if(n<=9){
printf(“%d “,n);
}
else{
f(n/10);
printf(“%d “,n%10);
}
}
entry.summary:
三子棋源代码

#include <stdio.h>
#define ROW 3
#define C
